  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
  2. Chromosome

Verwendungen von Klasse
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.Chromosome

Packages, die Chromosome verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
Contains implementations of the Mutation operator for the Darwinian Engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.

  • Verwendungen von Chromosome in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core, die Chromosome zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Chromosome<T>
    Individual.getChromosome(int index)
    Returns the chromosome at the specified index.
    Chromosome<T>
    ChromosomePair.getFirst()
    Returns the first chromosome of the pair.
    Chromosome<T>
    ChromosomePair.getSecond()
    Returns the second chromosome of the pair.
    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core, die Typen mit Argumenten vom Typ Chromosome zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    List<Chromosome<T>>
    Individual.getChromosomes()
    Returns the list of chromosomes of this individual.
    Konstruktoren in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Parametern vom Typ Chromosome
    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    ChromosomePair(Chromosome<T> first, Chromosome<T> second)
    Creates a pair of chromosomes.
    Konstruktorparameter in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Typargumenten vom Typ Chromosome
    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    Individual(List<Chromosome<T>> chromosomes)
    Creates a new individual with the given chromosomes.

  • Verwendungen von Chromosome in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation, die Chromosome zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Chromosome<Integer>
    BitFlipMutation.mutate(Chromosome<Integer> chromosome)
     
    Chromosome<T>
    Mutation.mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
    Applies a specific perturbation algorithm to the given chromosome.
    Chromosome<SymRegNode>
    PointAndSubtreeMutation.mutate(Chromosome<SymRegNode> chromosome)
     
    Chromosome<SymRegNode>
    PointMutation.mutate(Chromosome<SymRegNode> chromosome)
     
    Chromosome<T>
    SimpleMutation.mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
    Mutates the chromosome by replacing every gene with a random value from the mutation range.
    Chromosome<SymRegNode>
    SubtreeMutation.mutate(Chromosome<SymRegNode> chromosome)
     
    Chromosome<Integer>
    SudokuHybridMutation.mutate(Chromosome<Integer> chromosome)
     
    Chromosome<Integer>
    SudokuSwapMutation.mutate(Chromosome<Integer> chromosome)
     
    Chromosome<T>
    SwapMutation.mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
    Applies swap mutation by exchanging two randomly selected genes.
    Chromosome<T>
    UniformMutation.mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
    Mutates the chromosome by replacing genes with random values from the mutation range based on the configured mutation probability.
    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation mit Parametern vom Typ Chromosome

    Chromosome<T>
    UniformMutation.mutate(Chromosome<T> chromosome)
    Mutates the chromosome by replacing genes with random values from the mutation range based on the configured mutation probability.

    CryptanalysisFitnessFunction.decrypt(String cipher, Chromosome<Character> key)
    Decrypts the ciphertext using the given substitution key.
